article_meta.title: US News exclusive ICE agent who opened fire on Renee Good was dragged, hospitalized by illegal migrant driver last year

reasoning: The summary is more neutral than the source but still adopts some loaded framing (e.g., "illegal migrant/immigrant," "dramatically surged") and presents dramatic statistics without attribution. It emphasizes DHS/Trump defenses and omits other perspectives present in the article, like the governor’s earlier criticism.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses interpretive phrasing like "dramatically surged" and labels encounter as "violent" rather than purely factual wording.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Presents large percentage increases in attacks and threats as facts without attributing to DHS stats.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Self-defense is attributed to DHS/Trump; minimal subjective judgment stated as fact.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone avoids the source’s strongest terms but retains some heightened language ("dramatically surged").
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks by the model.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about internal motives or intentions.
custom_reasoning.slant: Emphasizes DHS/Trump defense; gives little space to critical context compared to what exists in the article.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits governor’s prior critical "Gestapo" remark and lacks mention of protester perspectives while including DHS/Trump.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Adopts politically loaded terms "illegal migrant/immigrant" from the source.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Focus on attacks and tensions mirrors article; no extra amplification.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Relies on official sources (DHS/President) without balancing with opposing viewpoints present.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source overall but still carries some loaded framing and unattributed claims.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Lists only "New York Post" as a source; omits DHS, Trump, law enforcement, and critical voices noted in the article.
